lessons.what_happened: yfinance CSV has 3-row multi-level header (Price, Ticker, Date). read_csv with parse_dates failed because Ticker row was read as data.
lessons.root_cause: yfinance changed its CSV export format to include a Ticker sub-header row.
lessons.prevention_rule: When loading yfinance CSVs, always use header=0, skiprows=[1,2] to skip the Ticker and Date sub-header rows.

lessons.what_happened: Silver futures (SI=F) support/target were set to spot-price levels ($28.50/$38.00) but SI=F trades at ~$76. First scan produced nonsensical R:R of -0.8:1.
lessons.root_cause: Confused silver spot price with futures contract price.
lessons.prevention_rule: Always verify current price BEFORE setting support/target levels in the watchlist. Run a quick yf.download sanity check.

lessons.what_happened: Scanner failed to fetch Gold (GC=F): [Errno 22] Invalid argument
lessons.prevention_rule: Check yfinance connectivity and ticker validity for GC=F.
